fields.label: Persona / system prompt
fields.help: Replaces the assistant's persona and behavior instructions. The structural output format the pipeline depends on (direction/tone tagging) is always preserved underneath, regardless of what you write here. Leave empty to use the default translator persona.

fields.label: Temperature
fields.help: Higher = more varied/creative phrasing, lower = more literal/consistent. Leave unset to use the provider's own default.

fields.label: Top-p
fields.help: Nucleus sampling cutoff. Leave unset to use the provider's default.

fields.label: Max tokens
fields.help: Upper bound on the length of one response. Leave unset to use the provider's default.
